mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ARVU_SCRP_TRGT_L ( SCRP_TRGT_ID , PBLC_DATA_MNG_NO , SRCH_KWD , PBLC_DATA_PLAC_NM , PBLC_DATA_ADDR , PBLC_DATA_TEL_NO , PBLC_DATA_LTTD , PBLC_DATA_LGTD , REG_ID , REG_DTM , CHNG_ID , CHNG_DTM ) VALUES ( NEXTVAL(SEQ_ARVU_SCRP_TRGT_ID) , #{pblcDataMngNo} , #{srchKwd} , #{pblcDataPlacNm} , #{pblcDataAddr} , #{pblcDataTelNo} , #{pblcDataLttd} , #{pblcDataLgtd} , 'SYSTEM' , SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) , 'SYSTEM' , SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) )
mapper.select: SELECT SCRP_TRGT_ID , PBLC_DATA_PLAC_NM , PBLC_DATA_ADDR FROM TB_ARVU_SCRP_TRGT_L WHERE PROG_STAT_CD = '00' ORDER BY SCRP_TRGT_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ARVU_SCRP_TRGT_L SET PROG_STAT_CD = #{progStatCd} , LST_SCRP_DTM = CASE WHEN #{progStatCd} = '02' THEN SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) ELSE LST_SCRP_DTM END , CHNG_ID = 'SYSTEM' , CHNG_DTM = SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%f'), 1, 17) WHERE SCRP_TRGT_ID = #{scrpTrgtId}
